description: Use this API to return plant-related model starting array indices and status. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, ival = mdlind(ibus, id, string1, string2)
python_syntax: ierr, ival = mdlind(ibus, id, string1, string2)

parameters.name: string1
parameters.description: String indicating the type of plant-related model. (input).

parameters.name: string2
parameters.description: String indicating the plant-related model quantity desired. (input).

string2.description: Number of CON values used by the model.
Number of STATE values used by the model.
Number of VAR values used by the model.
Number of ICON values used by the model.

Bypassed flag: 0 = bypassed; 1 = not bypassed. Does not reflect machine status. For a model to be called during simulations the machine must be in service the type code of the bus must be 2 and the model’s bypassed flag must be not bypassed.

error_codes.description: Machine not in network but in model tables; ‘IVAL’ returned.
Machine not in network or in model tables; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
No model of type ‘STRING1’ for this machine; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
Model does not use any of this data type; ‘IVAL’ = 0 returned.
Dynamics data not present in working memory; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
